title: RNA Isolation from Plant Tissue Protocol 18: innuPREP Plant RNA Kit
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ahg5t","text":"Implemented by: Michael Melkonian and Barbara Surek","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"81b78","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1rj85","text":"A small number of algae samples were extracted using the innuPREP Plant RNA Kit (Analytik Jena, Jena Germany) with either the PL and RL lysis buffer.
